description: The storyline, conflict, and narrative arc that drives a literary work forward.

name.description: A short identifier or label for this plot element or storyline

story.description: A summary of the sequence of events that constitute this plot thread

conflict_type.description: The fundamental type of conflict driving the narrative

structure_beat.description: Where this plot element falls in the narrative structure, e.g. inciting incident, rising action, climax, resolution

resolution.description: How the conflict or storyline is resolved or left open
